VERIFICATION

Glanvu is published by the software author (Juan García Longarón) on GitHub:
  https://github.com/glanvu/glanvu/releases/tag/v0.5.3

This package downloads the official Windows release zip and verifies its SHA256:

  File:   Glanvu-0.5.3-windows-x86_64.zip
  SHA256: FBEAA068D928702A82B644A13BDCFA733F4F533AC42015C999BBD64BD36A726C

To verify the checksum yourself:

  PowerShell:
    Get-FileHash .\Glanvu-0.5.3-windows-x86_64.zip -Algorithm SHA256

  GitHub CLI:
    gh release view v0.5.0 --repo glanvu/glanvu --json assets `
      --jq '.assets[] | select(.name | endswith("windows-x86_64.zip")) | .digest'

The bundled LICENSE.txt is a copy of the project's Apache-2.0 license:
  https://github.com/glanvu/glanvu/blob/main/LICENSE
